---
title: "Workshop content"
subtitle: "NBIS_NEUNETDL_V26 • Neural Networks and Deep Learning"
description: "List of presentations"
listing:
  - id: slide-listings
    type: table
    grid-columns: 4
    fields: [session, title, description]
    field-display-names:
      session: "Session"
    sort: false
    contents:
      - rnn/lectures/index.qmd
      - basics/pytorch_intro/introduction_to_pytorch_1.md
      - basics/pytorch_intro/introduction_to_pytorch_2.md
      - good_practices/good_practices_project_design.md
      - cnn/lectures/CNN_lecture_1_classification.qmd
      - cnn/lectures/CNN_lecture_2_segmentation.qmd
      - representation_learning/lecture.qmd
  - id: lab-listings
    type: table
    grid-columns: 4
    sort: false
    fields: [session, title, description, notebook-url]
    field-display-names:
      notebook-url: "Jupyter Notebook"
      session: "Session"
    field-links:
      - title
      - notebook-url
    contents:
      - rnn/labs/airplanes.qmd
      - rnn/labs/alphabet.qmd
      - basics/labs/lab_introduction_to_pytorch.qmd
      - good_practices/labs/target_leakage/investigating_target_leakage.qmd
      - good_practices/labs/data_splits/rigorous_train_validation_splitting.qmd
      - cnn/labs/lab_classification.qmd
      - cnn/labs/lab_segmentation.qmd
      - representation_learning/labs/representation_learning.qmd
date: ""
toc: false
sidebar: true
format:
  html:
    number-sections: false
    page-layout: full
---

### A note on usage

Html slides have been authored using [revealjs](https://revealjs.com/)
and can be viewed directly in the browser. Press `s` to view speaker
notes.

### Slides

:::{#slide-listings}

:::

### Labs

:::{#lab-listings}

:::
